title: sonnea kingii
intro: Sonnea kingii, also known as the King's Cup or Mexican Marigold, is a perennial flower native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Sonnea kingii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for a range of applications in natural medicine.
